Nouveau.subject: Welcome to {school_name}, {contact_name}!
Nouveau.body:
Dear {contact_name},

We are delighted to welcome you to our platform.

{school_name} is an exceptional institution, and we look forward to connecting.

Best regards,
The Education CRM Team

Contacté.subject: Follow-up – Educational Platform
Contacté.body:
Hello {{SchoolName}},

We recently contacted you regarding our educational platform.
I just wanted to follow up and check if you had time to review our message.

Please let me know if you would like more details.

Kind regards,
{{YourName}}

Répondu.subject: Thank You for Your Response
Répondu.body:
Hello {{SchoolName}},

Thank you for your reply.
We appreciate your time and are happy to continue the discussion.

Please feel free to share any questions you may have.

Best regards,
{{YourName}}

Intéressé.subject: Additional Information About Our Platform
Intéressé.body:
Hello {{SchoolName}},

We are glad to hear about your interest.
Here are more details about our platform and how it can support your institution.

We would be happy to schedule a short demo if convenient.

Kind regards,
{{YourName}}

Démo planifiée.subject: Demo Confirmation
Démo planifiée.body:
Hello {{SchoolName}},

This email confirms our scheduled demo on {{DemoDate}}.
We look forward to presenting our platform and answering your questions.

Best regards,
{{YourName}}

Démo réalisée.subject: Thank You for Attending the Demo
Démo réalisée.body:
Hello {{SchoolName}},

Thank you for attending the demo.
We hope it was helpful and informative.

We would appreciate your feedback and are available for any further questions.

Kind regards,
{{YourName}}

Client.subject: Welcome to {{CompanyName}}
Client.body:
Hello {{SchoolName}},

Welcome to {{CompanyName}}.
We are excited to start this collaboration and support your institution.

Our team will remain available for any assistance you need.

Best regards,
{{YourName}}

Perdu.subject: Thank You for Your Time
Perdu.body:
Hello {{SchoolName}},

Thank you for your time and consideration.
We understand that this may not be the right moment.

If your needs change in the future, we will be happy to reconnect.

Best regards,
{{YourName}}
